I'm really confused by this, and can't duplicate it here. 

Can you show me the following: 

- the results of "grep PERL /etc/make.conf" 

- in devel/p5-namespace-clean (e.g.), the results of: 

make -V PERL_VERSION 
make -V PERL_LEVEL 
make -V want_perl_sign 
make -V USE_PERL5_LEVEL 

Thanks.
